title: Transcript:Death on the Isle
wikitext:
{{Transcript|quest}}
{{Transcript list|Patzi|Adala|Wandering Guard|Villa Guard|Head Butler|Constantinius|Cozyac|Pavo|Xocotla|Hutza|Stradius|Costumer|Naiatli|Clodius}}

==Starting the quest==
* '''Patzi:''' Good day! I don't suppose I could trouble you for the briefest of moments?
* {{tcond|If the player does not meet the quest requirements:}}
** '''Player:''' I suppose I could consider being troubled for a little...
** '''Patzi:''' Ah, on second thoughts, you may not be cut out for this job.
** {{tbox|You do not meet all of the requirements to start the Death on the Isle quest.}}
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player meets the quest requirements:}}
** '''Player:''' Good day to you! I could consider being troubled, for the right reasons.
** '''Patzi:''' How does access to a rather fancy party sound as a motivator?
** '''Player:''' Well, just as long as I get to actually enjo-
** '''Patzi:''' I'm sure I can also rustle up some payment to encourange you, if you have any reservations.
** '''Patzi:''' You may even find some... exciting opportunities inside, given the presence of some of Aldarin's wealthiest citizens!
** '''Player:''' So if you're going to this party, would you also be one of Aldarin's wealthiest citizens?
** '''Patzi:''' Alas, I am, quite unfortunately, not rich in money. What I do possess is a certain wealth...
** '''Patzi:''' ... of talent! For you see I am... an actor! Patzi the Grand, they'll call me... eventually.
** '''Player:''' They call me [player name]... just [player name]. So if you're not rich in money, how am I going to get paid, assuming I agree to help you with... whatever it is you want.
** '''Patzi:''' Cutting words, but you need not worry. While you won't be getting paid upfront, I have a feeling that if all goes well, I will soon find myself with more than enough wealth to handsomely reward you.
** '''Patzi:''' And besides, if nothing else, I'm sure you'll have a wonderful time at the party!
** {{tselect|Start the Death on the Isle quest?}}
** {{topt|Yes.}}
*** '''Player:''' I suppose I could do with letting my hair down a little. Alright, I'm in.
*** '''Patzi:''' Wonderful!
*** '''Player:''' So whose party are we going to?
*** '''Patzi:''' Well, that's complicated...
*** '''Player:''' You don't know?
*** '''Patzi:''' Sometimes a man has to follow his heart... and a second hand invitation saying there's a party at Villa Lucens tonight.
*** '''Player:''' Villa Lucens?
*** '''Patzi:''' Yes! The villa is home to an almighty patron of the arts! He even has his own theatre atop the cliffs behind the villa! In fact, the whole reason for this party is because he's showing his new play!
*** '''Player:''' And yet you don't actually know who he is?
*** '''Patzi:''' This opportunity came about quite suddenly. As such, I'm unfortunately not as prepared as I otherwise would be. However, an actor like myself can't turn down the chance to meet with a man like him.
*** '''Adala:''' Not to mention the chance to enjoy a good party.
*** '''Patzi:''' Well said, Adala. Oh that reminds me, [player name], this is Adala. She's also helping me out today!
*** '''Player:''' If you have her, why do you need me?
*** '''Patzi:''' She advertised herself as a bag carrier, so she's here to move my bag around. There's a lot of costumes and props that I travel with, so it's nice to have someone else carry them.
*** '''Adala:''' I'm not going to say no to going to a fancy party, even as the help.
*** '''Patzi:''' As for your part in all this, [player name], with this being a fancy party and all, I'm going to need a butler to help me fit in.
*** '''Player:''' A butler?
*** '''Patzi:''' You know, serving me wine and tending to my needs. Fancy suit and all?
*** '''Player:''' Right... So I don't actually get to enjoy the party at all, do I?
*** '''Patzi:''' Oh I'm sure you will. You'll just have to act a little here and there!
*** '''Player:''' I see... You mentioned a fancy suit. You wouldn't happen to have a butler outfit in that bag you mentioned?
*** '''Patzi:''' I don't believe I do. I don't really take roles like that these days.
*** '''Player:''' Well, in that case, any idea where I might get one, preferably free of charge?
*** '''Adala:''' Lots of the villas around here will have butlers, and butlers mean uniforms.
*** '''Player:''' Are you suggesting I steal one?
*** '''Adala:''' I suppose you could always put it back once you're done.
*** '''Player:''' And I'm sure whoever I take it from will be overjoyed to have had someone else wearing their uniform.
*** '''Patzi:''' Hmm... Maybe I should add a butler's uniform to my vast array of costumes after all.
*** '''Adala:''' I doubt they'll ever even realise. Anyway, I remember seeing some uniforms through a window on the way over here. They were in a villa to the north.
*** '''Player:''' Right... I guess I'm off to find a uniform then.
*** '''Patzi:''' Good luck!
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|No.}}
*** '''Player:''' I'm not really a party person these days, I'm afraid.
*** '''Patzi:''' Quite unfortunate. In that case, please make sure to keep an eye out for me at your local theatre. I'll be a star soon!
*** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Patzi after rejecting the quest===
* '''Patzi:''' Hello again! Are you feeling more in the partying spirit now?
* {{tselect|Start the Death on the Isle quest?}}
* {{topt|Yes.}}
** {{tact|above}}
* {{topt|No.}}
** {{tact|above}}

==Getting a uniform==
===Talking to Patzi without a uniform===
* '''Patzi:''' How's the costume hunt going?
* '''Player:''' If I'm going to be working, shouldn't we be calling it a uniform?
* '''Patzi:''' Yes, I suppose so! Either way, Adala should be able to help you get your hands on one.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Adala without a uniform===
* '''Adala:''' Any luck finding that villa with the spare uniforms in yet?
* '''Player:''' Not quite. You said it was to the north of here?
* '''Adala:''' I believe so. Once you get there, you should keep an eye out for any guards. Wouldn't want you to get arrested before the party starts!
* {{tact|end}}

===Stealing a uniform===
* {{tbox|pic=Butler's uniform (top) detail.png|pic2=Butler's uniform (bottom) detail.png|You steal a uniform from the wardrobe.}}
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to steal another uniform===
* '''Player:''' This person has a lot of uniforms, but I shouldn't take more than I need.
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to enter the house window while in view of the guard===
* '''Player:''' I probably shouldn't break into a house in full view of a guard.
* '''Wandering Guard:''' I definitely wouldn't recommend it.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Adala or Patzi with a uniform===
* '''Adala:''' I see you've  managed to find a uniform.
* '''Player:''' I have indeed. You must have a good eye to have seen them  through a window as you walked by?
* '''Adala:''' It was a bit of a lucky spot, I must admit!
* '''Player:''' Lucky indeed. It's almost like you were specifically looking for them?
* '''Adala:''' Just good fortune. Now, I ought to get a move on getting this bag inside.
* {{tbox|Adala heads inside.}}
* '''Patzi:''' Oh, she's in a rush, isn't she?
* '''Player:''' Given the size of your bag, I'm not sure she's rushing anywhere.
* '''Patzi:''' Well, she sets a good example. You should probably be heading on in yourself.
* '''Player:''' I'm guessing the entrance is just up these stairs?
* '''Patzi:''' The guest entrance is yes...
* '''Player:''' Don't tell me...
* '''Patzi:''' You'll have to go in through the staff entrance, unfortunately. I can't be seen entering with the help.
* '''Player:''' The help?
* '''Patzi:''' Sorry, just getting into character.
* '''Patzi:''' You will have to use the staff entrance though.
* '''Player:''' Where would I find said entrance?
* '''Patzi:''' I'll bet Adala went through it. You should've followed her! I think she headed somewhere along that hedgerow.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Patzi after Adala is gone===
* '''Patzi:''' Oh, she's in a rush, isn't she?
* '''Player:''' Given the size of your bag, I'm not sure she's rushing anywhere.
* '''Patzi:''' Well, she sets a good example. You should probably be heading on in yourself.
* '''Player:''' I'm guessing the entrance is just up these stairs?
* '''Patzi:''' The guest entrance is yes...
* '''Player:''' Don't tell me...
* '''Patzi:''' You'll have to go in through the staff entrance, unfortunately. I can't be seen entering with the help.
* '''Player:''' The help?
* '''Patzi:''' Sorry, just getting into character.
* '''Patzi:''' You will have to use the staff entrance though.
* '''Player:''' Where would I find said entrance?
* '''Patzi:''' I'll bet Adala went through it. You should've followed her! I think she headed somewhere along that hedgerow.
* {{tact|end}}

==Getting inside the Villa==
===Talking to Patzi===
* '''Player:''' Where was that staff entrance that you mentioned?
* '''Patzi:''' I'm guessing Adala went through it. I think she headed somewhere along that hedgerow.
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to enter through the guest entrance===
* '''Villa Guard:''' Sorry, entry here is for guests only.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the head butler===
====Without the butler uniform worn====
* '''Player:''' Oh yes, just give me a moment...
* '''Head Butler:''' Nilsal to you.
* '''Player:''' Hello there. I'm here to work.
* '''Head Butler:''' Not without a uniform you're not.
* '''Player:''' Oh yes, just give me a moment...
* {{tact|end}}

====With the butler uniform worn====
* '''Head Butler:''' Oh, nilsal, to you. I wasn't expecting anyone else.
* '''Player:''' Sorry, there was a bit of a hold up. I'm quite new to this.
* '''Head Butler:''' A hold up? Nothing bad I hope? I've known people to have problems with their employers before. Is yours treating you well?
* '''Player:''' He seems... friendly enough. I'm still not sure if I'm getting paid though.
* '''Head Butler:''' Tetamo! Oh dear, oh dear. Are you part of a union?
* '''Player:''' I don't remember joining one. I probably should with the... varied working conditions I go through.
* '''Head Butler:''' We have a fantastic one here on Aldarin, if you're interested. I can't say discussions are effective, but sometimes the wealthy do come to the table!
* '''Player:''' I think this is a one-time gig for me, but thank you!
* '''Head Butler:''' Very well. In that case, there are just a few quick admin bits to go through before I let you in.
* '''Head Butler:''' First and foremost, butlers must keep their uniforms and masks on at all times. If you are seen without yours, you will be ejected from the party.
* '''Player:''' Got it. No taking off my uniform. What's this about masks?
* '''Head Butler:''' All staff are to be as anonymous as possible tonight so we'll provide you with a mask on entry. We'll be using them to keep track of who's coming and going.
* '''Head Butler:''' Now, for security purposes, butlers are required to enter and leave with completely empty pockets. We'll hold on to anything you need us to whilst you're in there.
* '''Player:''' Got it, nothing in and nothing out.
* '''Head Butler:''' Right, I think that covers everything. Are you ready to enter?
=====Without a follower=====
* {{topt|I am.}}
** '''Player:''' I am.
** '''Head Butler:''' Good good. We'll hold on to any items you have on you whilst you're in there.
** {{tact|Player is transported inside of Villa Lucens.}}
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt| Not quite.}}
** '''Player:''' Not quite.
** '''Head Butler:''' Very well.
** {{tact|end}}
=====With a follower=====
* {{topt|I am.}}
** '''Player:''' I am.
** '''Head Butler:''' Then you should put your follower away.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt| Not quite.}}
** '''Player:''' Not quite.
** '''Head Butler:''' Very well.
** {{tact|end}}

===Exiting via guest entrance===
* '''Villa Guard:''' Sorry, you'll need to use the staff exit.
* {{tact|end}}

===Exiting via staff entrance===
* '''Head Butler:''' Did you want to leave?
* {{tselect|Select an option}}
* {{topt|Yes.}}
** '''Player:''' Yes.
** {{tact|Player is transported outside of Villa Lucens.}}
* {{topt|No.}}
** '''Player:''' No.
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the head butler again===
* '''Head Butler:''' Ah, welcome back. Are you ready to enter?
* {{topt|I am.}}
** {{tact|above}}
* {{topt|Not quite.}}
** {{tact|above}}

===Talking to the head butler after having entered the Villa===
* '''Head Butler:''' Do you want to go back in?
* {{topt|Yes.}}
** '''Player:''' Yes.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|No.}}
** '''Player:''' No.
** {{tact|end}}

==Inside Villa Lucens==
===Attempting to speak to anyone but Patzli===
* '''Player:''' I should probably speak to Patzi before doing anything in here.
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to enter the theatre===
* '''Villa Guard:''' Sorry, entry here is for guests only.
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to enter the {{FloorNumber|uk=2}}===
* '''Player:''' I shouldn't go too far from the party for now.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Patzi===
* '''Patzi:''' You made it in, and don't you look the part! Magnificent!
* {{tcond|If the player has not completed [[The Fremennik Isles]]:}}
** '''Player:''' I feel like a court jester...
** {{tact|continue}}
* {{tcond|If the player has completed [[The Fremennik Isles]]:}}
** '''Player:''' I feel like a court jester... and not for the first time either.
** {{tact|continue}}
* '''Patzi:''' Nonsense! Now, why not go and introduce yourself to our host and the other guests? I could do with knowing a little more about everyone.
* '''Player:''' Hang on, I'm meant to be an anonymous butler. How do you expect me to get to know people for you?
* '''Patzi:''' I'm sure you can get their names at least. That will give me something to work with.
* '''Player:''' Okay... Anything else I can do for you, especially things you could easily do for yourself?
* '''Patzi:''' No, no. I think you're doing more than enough right now, thank you.
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Patzi again====
* '''Patzi:''' How's your little task going?
* '''Player:''' I haven't quite made my way around everyone the party yet.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Constantinius===
* '''Constantinius:''' So, this is grand isn't it?
* '''Player:''' It certainly seems to be quite the event.
* '''Constantinius:''' I'd say it's one of my finest yet, though I do wish more of the guests could've made it. However, it looks like we've gained a bit of a straggler.
* '''Player:''' A straggler?
* '''Constantinius:''' Yes, that slightly pompous fellow that hasn't introduced himself to anyone yet. The fact that he's here means he must have gained an invitation, though I don't know how...
* '''Player:''' Er... Is that going to be an issue?
* '''Constantinius:''' I'm sure it won't be! I'm always open to meeting new people, especially those who enjoy the arts.
* '''Player:''' Oh good, because it's actually him who I'm here with. He was very keen to meet you, even though he didn't actually know your name...
* '''Constantinius:''' I can't believe it! How could he not even know the name of his gracious host?
* '''Player:''' Perhaps he's new to the island... Still, for an actor, his research seems lacking.
* '''Constantinius:''' He's an actor you say? Ah, now that explains why he was so eager to be here. Well, if he's good, this might be his lucky day. I, Constantinius, am in the market for a new actor to sponsor.
* '''Player:''' Sponsor?
* '''Constantinius:''' Well, you know actors. Very profitable once they're popular. I like to... make investments.
* '''Constantinius:''' For example, I've sponsored tonight's lead actor, Livius, for some time. He's done very well for himself, and for me, though he's almost too expensive for me these days.
* '''Constantinius:''' Anyway, perhaps you'll see him tonight on stage!
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Constantinius again (house not on Aldarin)====
* '''Player:''' So, Constantinius, how often do you put on these parties?
* '''Constantinius:''' Whenever we have a new play to unveil! I've got a couple of creatives from Tempestus that can write up a storm, so I find myself hosting these events more and more!
* '''Player:''' How does one usually get themselves invited?
* '''Constantinius:''' Normally we just send the invitations out to all the villas on the island! If you can afford one, then you're welcome here.
* '''Player:''' Well, I'm actually wealthy enough to be a homeowner myself, but not on Aldarin unfortunately.
* '''Constantinius:''' You must try to change that before next time. After all, the more the merrier.
* '''Player:''' And you're definitely okay with me and my... we'll call him my employer, I guess. You're definitely okay with us being here?
* '''Constantinius:''' Well, we sadly had a few who couldn't attend this time, so I'm actually quite glad you're here. Still, I wouldn't mind knowing how your employer managed to acquire an invitation...
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Constantinius again (house on Aldarin)====
* '''Player:''' So, Constantinius, how often do you put on these parties?
* '''Constantinius:''' Whenever we have a new play to unveil! I've got a couple of creatives from Tempestus that can write up a storm, so I find myself hosting these events more and more!
* '''Player:''' How does one usually get themselves invited?
* '''Constantinius:''' Normally we just send the invitations out to all the villas on the island! If you can afford one, then you're welcome here.
* '''Player:''' Well, I actually own a home here on the island. Perhaps I can be invited next time!
* '''Constantinius:''' Perhaps so. After all, the more the merrier.
* '''Player:''' And you're definitely okay with me and my... we'll call him my employer, I guess. You're definitely okay with us being here?
* '''Constantinius:''' Well, we sadly had a few who couldn't attend this time, so I'm actually quite glad you're here. Still, I wouldn't mind knowing how your employer managed to acquire an invitation...
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Cozyac===
* '''Player:''' Good day, sir.
* '''Cozyac:''' Sir? I thought I'd left that behind when I retired. Please, call me Cozyac.
* '''Player:''' Absolutely, Cozyac. You can call me...
* '''Cozyac:''' I seem to remember one of the rules of this party was that the staff were to remain anonymous.
* '''Player:''' You can't call me then. Are you enjoying the party?
* '''Cozyac:''' I am, yes. Though I am far more excited for tonight's performance. Constantinius says he's hired some of the finest actors for this one!
* {{tact|end}}

====Talking to Cozyac again====
* '''Player:''' Still enjoying yourself, Cozyac?
* '''Cozyac:''' Absolutely! Though I'm starting to feel myself in need of another drink. I don't suppose you could sort that when you have a moment?
* '''Player:''' I can certainly look into it.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Pavo===
* '''Pavo:''' Excuse me! You there!
* '''Player:''' Hi there. How can I be of service?
* '''Pavo:''' I could do with... another drink.
* '''Player:''' Do you have a preference? Wine, or something non- alcoholic?
* '''Pavo:''' Alcoholic? I'll have you know that I, Pavo, am most certainly not an alcoholic. Now scram.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Pavo again===
* '''Pavo:''' Did you get that drink I asked for?
* '''Player:''' You sent me away before telling me what drink you actually wanted.
* '''Pavo:''' That's my mistake. I'll take some wine... Preferably a barrel of it.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Xocotla===
* '''Player:''' Good day to you.
* '''Xocotla:''' Nilsal to you as well. You seem different to the other staff here. First time?
* '''Player:''' It is. How could you tell?
* '''Xocotla:''' You see similar things on boats. People look a bit wobbly until they settle.
* '''Player:''' Oh, I hadn't noticed I was...
* '''Xocotla:''' Few ever do.
* '''Player:''' So do you spend a lot of time on boats?
* '''Xocotla:''' I run something of a shipping company. If you need it moving, Xocotla's Got Ya!
* '''Player:''' Well, I don't typically find myself in need of that sort of thing, but if that ever changes, I'll keep you in mind.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Xocotla again===
* '''Player:''' So about that shipping...
* '''Xocotla:''' I'd have preferred not to talk about work, but I suppose you do seem friendly enough.
* '''Player:''' What sort of things can you move?
* '''Xocotla:''' We can securely move pretty much anything. Animals, valuables, bulk cargo.
* '''Xocotla:''' Swiftness and discretion are valuable to us, if you catch my drift.
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to enter the cellar before being asked to===
* '''Player''': I have no reason to go down there right now.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Patzi after talking to everyone else===
* '''Patzi:''' I saw you make your way around the party! So then, who's who?
* '''Player:''' So, we've got...
* '''Player:''' Pavo, the drunk one over there. I'm not sure there's much to them other than their love of drinking.
* '''Player:''' Xocotla, who seems a lot more relaxed. It seems that she runs a shipping business.
* '''Player:''' Last of all for the guests we have Cozyac. He's quite up on the rules of this party, so he might not be happy that you weren't properly invited.
* '''Patzi:''' Pfft, invited? I have an invitation and I can act like I belong here! He'll never know!
* '''Player:''' He might not, but our host Constantinius does.
* '''Patzi:''' Ah...
* '''Player:''' Luckily, he didn't actually seem to mind you being here too much. Apparently he's actually looking for a new actor to sponsor.
* '''Patzi:''' Sponsoring... me? How marvellous! Oh I think I should have a drink to celebrate! Could you be a dear and go into the wine cellar for me?
* '''Player:''' What would you like from the wine cellar? A beer?
* '''Patzi:''' Whilst that sounds lovely, I've heard there's some Principum Red down there! It's not produced any more so is rather hard to find, but our generous host seems happy enough to share.
* '''Player:''' Alright, one glass of wine coming right up.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Patzi again===
* '''Patzi:''' Did you manage to find that wine yet?
* '''Player:''' I haven't had a chance to even go into the cellar yet. You'll have to give me a moment.
* '''Patzi:''' Remember, you're looking for Principum Red. I'm sure it will be labelled.
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to climb the stairs back up===
* '''Player:''' I shouldn't go too far from the party for now.
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to open the door to the cupboard===
* '''Player:''' 'Cupboard, keep out!' Why does it say keep out?
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to climb the stairs before investigating the wine===
* '''Player:''' I shouldn't return to the party empty handed.

===Attempting to open the fancy chest===
* {{tbox|The chest is securely locked.}}
* {{tact|end}}

===Investigating the antique wine===
* '''Player:''' Pri...pum Re...
* '''Player:''' Hmm... The label's faded, but I'm sure this is the wine Patzi was talking about.
* {{tbox|pic=Broken glass detail.png|You're suddenly startled by the sound of a glass shattering in another part of the cellar, causing you to spill some of the wine on yourself.}}
* '''Player:''' What... Oh, that's going to stain isn't it...
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to investigate the antique wine again===
* '''Player:''' I think it's probably best if I don't mess around with this again.
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to climb the stairs after investigating the wine===
* '''Player:''' I guess I shouldn't leave without investigating that noise.
* {{tact|end}}

===Investigating the man on the floor===
* '''Player:''' Is everything okay?
* '''Player:''' Hello?
* '''Player:''' Have you had too much to drink?
* '''Stradius:''' You there! Don't move!
* '''Player:''' What the...
* '''Hutza:''' You're coming with us.
* {{tact|Player is transported to a small room on the ground floor of the villa.}}
* '''Stradius:''' It's always the butler, isn't it.
* '''Hutza:''' Now now, Stradius. We don't know for sure they did it. It looks likely though.
* '''Player:''' Did what exactly?
* '''Stradius:''' Murder!
* '''Hutza:''' Stradius!
* '''Stradius:''' What?
* '''Hutza:''' It was my turn to level the accusation at a suspect...
* '''Stradius:''' How often do we get to handle a murder?
* '''Hutza:''' You have to respect the systems we have, Stradius!
* '''Player:''' I'm still here, in case you forgot?
* '''Hutza:''' So, murder. Interesting choice at a party full of wealthy people, wouldn't you say?
* '''Stradius:''' Poor Livius... He wasn't acting this time.
* '''Player:''' But I didn't kill anyone?
* '''Stradius:''' You just happened to be found standing in a closed room with a dead body?
* '''Hutza:''' With bloodstains on your clothes, no less.
* '''Player:''' Bloodstains?
* '''Hutza:''' The red stains on your uniform. The victim's blood, I'm sure of it.
* '''Player:''' You found me in a wine cellar and you won't even consider that it might be wine?
* '''Stradius:''' I suppose I could try tasting it...
* '''Hutza:''' Stradius! What if it's blood?
* '''Stradius:''' Well, then it won't taste like wine, will it?
* '''Hutza:''' No, you make a good point actually.
* '''Player:''' I'm just going to go...
* '''Stradius:''' Oh no you won't! You're going to wait right there and answer some questions!
* '''Player:''' Would you believe me if I said I didn't do it?
* '''Hutza:''' We'll consider it.
* '''Stradius:''' We will?
* '''Hutza:''' But first, questions! Why were you down in that cellar?
* '''Player:''' I was looking for a wine. Principum Red? Patzi sent me to get some for him to drink. I just happened to hear a commotion and thought someone may have been hurt.
* '''Stradius:''' So you were just trying to help?
* '''Player:''' Yes!
* '''Stradius:''' Honestly, I'm sold.
* '''Hutza:''' Stradius...
* '''Stradius:''' Ah, yes, sorry...
* '''Stradius:''' I'm afraid we can't just let you go. Not without an investigation.
* '''Hutza:''' Not to mention, given our whole job here was to stop anything bad happening at this party, we're not really doing so well right now. We'll look even more ineffective if we don't have a suspect...
* '''Stradius:''' Could be a career ender, really.
* '''Hutza:''' Quite.
* '''Player:''' Okay... Well, much like I didn't kill that man, I suppose I don't want to hurt your careers. Maybe I could catch the killer!
* '''Hutza:''' Do you have any relevant qualifications?
* '''Stradius:''' Wait... are we meant to have...
* '''Hutza:''' After all, training to be a butler must have taken a long time.
* '''Player:''' But I'm not even a butler! I got hired to act like one!
* '''Hutza:''' Right, now I have to put murder back on the table! Who are you?
* '''Player:''' I'm just [player name]. I got hired by Patzi to be a butler for this evening, alongside a lady called Adala.
* '''Stradius:''' Adala? Do we know an Adala?
* '''Hutza:''' Yes, I believe she's accounted for.
* '''Player:''' You ran into her?
* '''Hutza:''' She came in shortly after we arrested you. Your friend, Patzi, mentioned she'd been sorting out some of his costumes.
* '''Player:''' You mean she was only accounted for after the murder took place?
* '''Stradius:''' Why do I get the feeling we're not doing a good job of actually investigating this?
* '''Hutza:''' It isn't just you.
* '''Player:''' Again, maybe I could be an extra pair of hands here.
